description.value:
Fanatic

The Fanatic is driven by an unshakeable conviction — a burning, consuming faith in the God-Emperor that borders on madness. Where others waver, the Fanatic charges forward. Where others question, the Fanatic already has the answer: purge the unholy. Their zeal is a weapon as potent as any bolt shell, inspiring allies and terrifying enemies in equal measure. Whether they channel their fervour through sermons, war-hymns, or the simple application of righteous violence, the Fanatic is the warband's spiritual core and its most relentless combatant against the forces of the Warp.

Role Aptitudes

Leadership, Offence, Strength, Toughness, Willpower

Role Talent

Jaded or Resistance (Fear)

Role Bonus

Destroy the Unholy: When fighting enemies with the Daemonic or Warp trait, the character gains +10 to Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests against them.

specialAbilities.name: Destroy the Unholy
specialAbilities.description: When fighting enemies with the Daemonic or Warp trait, the character gains +10 to Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill tests against them.
